dps310_init.message0: Initialize DPS310 sensor I2C address %1 using %2
dps310_init.tooltip: Initialize DPS310 pressure sensor via I2C interface

dps310_correct_temp.tooltip: Fix DPS310 temperature measurement offset, recommended to call right after initialization

dps310_read_temperature.tooltip: Read DPS310 temperature in Celsius. Higher oversampling gives better precision but slower speed

dps310_read_pressure.tooltip: Read DPS310 pressure in Pascal. Higher oversampling gives better precision but slower speed

dps310_read_altitude.message0: Read DPS310 altitude (m) sea level pressure %1 hPa
dps310_read_altitude.tooltip: Calculate altitude from pressure, requires local sea level pressure (default 1013.25 hPa)
